description: Every Yahoo Finance endpoint plus a SQLite portfolio, covered-call screener, and Chrome-cookie fallback the libraries don't ship.

tools.name: autocomplete_get
tools.description: Autocomplete symbols and company names. Required: query. Optional: lang (default: en), region (default: US). Returns the AutocompleteResult.

tools.name: chart_get
tools.description: Historical price chart data for a symbol. Required: symbol. Optional: interval (default: 1d), range (default: 1mo), period1 (plus 3 more). Returns the Chart.

params.name: events
params.description: Events to include: div, split, earn

tools.name: fundamentals_timeseries
tools.description: Fundamentals time series (EPS, revenue, margin, cash flow, etc.). Required: symbol, type. Optional: period1 (default: 0), period2. Returns the TimeSeries.

tools.name: insights_get
tools.description: Insights for a symbol: technical events, valuation, research reports. Required: symbol. Returns the Insights.

tools.name: lookup_query
tools.description: Search for symbols, news, and funds matching a query. Required: query. Optional: quotesCount (default: 10), newsCount (default: 5), region (default: US). Returns the SearchResult.

tools.name: options_get
tools.description: Options chain for a symbol (calls and puts). Required: symbol. Optional: date. Returns the OptionChain.

params.name: date
params.description: Expiration unix epoch (omit for nearest expiration)

tools.name: quote_list
tools.description: Get current quotes for one or more symbols. Required: symbols. Optional: fields, region (default: US). Returns array of Quote.

tools.name: quote_summary
tools.description: Deep quote summary including price, fundamentals, ownership, and filings. Required: symbol. Optional: modules. Returns the QuoteSummary.

params.name: modules
params.description: Comma-separated quoteSummary modules: assetProfile, summaryProfile, summaryDetail, price, financialData, defaultKeyStatistics, incomeStatementHistory, incomeStatementHistoryQuarterly, balanceSheetHistory, balanceSheetHistoryQuarterly, cashflowStatementHistory, cashflowStatementHistoryQuarterly, earnings, earningsHistory, earningsTrend, calendarEvents, secFilings, upgradeDowngradeHistory, recommendationTrend, institutionOwnership, fundOwnership, majorHoldersBreakdown, insiderHolders, insiderTransactions, netSharePurchaseActivity, indexTrend, industryTrend, sectorTrend

tools.name: recommendations_bysymbol
tools.description: Symbols that share recommendations with the given symbol. Required: symbol. Returns the Recommendations.

tools.name: screener_predefined
tools.description: Run a predefined screener by ID. Required: scrIds (default: day_gainers). Optional: count (default: 25), region (default: US). Returns array of ScreenerQuote.

params.name: scrIds
params.description: Predefined screener: day_gainers, day_losers, most_actives, undervalued_growth_stocks, aggressive_small_caps, small_cap_gainers, top_mutual_funds, undervalued_large_caps, growth_technology_stocks, portfolio_anchors, conservative_foreign_funds, high_yield_bond

tools.name: trending_list
tools.description: Top trending symbols in a region right now. Required: region (default: US). Optional: count (default: 10). Returns array of TrendingSymbol.

params.name: region
params.description: Region code: US, GB, FR, DE, HK, IN, AU, CA, BR, SG, TW, IT, ES, NL
